channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gen X built their identity on self-reliance. Retirement is the one challenge they cannot face alone
item.description: As a latchkey kid myself, I know that 'one more year' is never about money—it's about identity without a job.

item.title: Weak yen made Tokyo a bargain; strong shekel made Tel Aviv the priciest city for McDonald's
item.description: A Deutsche Bank report notes defense spending boosted the shekel, while a weak yen gave Japan the world's cheapest iPhones.

item.title: Ginsburg and Biden's blind spot: when leaders fail to know when to step down
item.description: George Washington believed it too, then walked away twice. Ginsburg and Biden believed it, but did not.

item.title: Why Friday afternoon is the worst time to shop online — and marketers know when your guard is down
item.description: A University of Tennessee study found that 30 seconds of Instagram scrolling can make shoppers trust bold, unproven brand claims.
